meaning: n.佛罗伦萨(意大利都市名)
examples: We celebrated our 25th wedding anniversary in Florence.
Florence and a team of nurses went to help.
What does the case of the Uffizi in Florence show?
Florence Wambugu knows the kind of hunger that swells the stomach and dulls the eyes.
Thankfully, from market food to Michelin-star restaurants, Florence is full of delicious eateries for every budget.
